spec_match.rationale: Wraps a stream reader as AsyncDisposable so releaseLock() runs at scope exit — direct application of the async dispose proposal.

interactive.rationale: Run scenarios that early-return / throw and watch the lock release in the log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises automatic lock release on scope exit; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show the case where reader.read() rejects (stream errored). Doesn't demonstrate releaseLock() being idempotent or what happens if you re-getReader() in the same scope.

openQuestions.title: Probe errored-stream behaviour
openQuestions.detail: When the stream errors before the reader is fully consumed, the lock should still release. Add a scenario where reader.read() rejects and check the lock state in the log.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 1 follow-up question(s) remain.
